environment: Docker Linux container from rust:1.91-bookworm with nodejs installed (v18.20.4)
commands: node skills/inbox-triage/run.mjs with RUNX_INPUTS_JSON for each fixture

harness.note: runx harness asserts sealed execution and receipt status; semantic output assertions are recorded in evidence/local-smoke.json.

assertions: fixture decisions match expected ready/needs_more_evidence/refused states
happy path produces a gated draft for dana@example.com
missing sender, missing body, auto-send, and disallowed commitment expose expected stop fields
digest-only packet classifies no_reply without a draft or send proposal

observations: The package contains SKILL.md, X.yaml, fixtures, and a deterministic local run.mjs cli-tool runner.

Schema validation result: Python JSON/YAML parsing succeeded for every fixture/evidence JSON file and X.yaml; runx doctor skills/inbox-triage --json returned status=success with errors=0, warnings=0, infos=0.
The emitted packet schema is runx.inbox.triage.v1, matching the X.yaml artifact packet declaration.
runx harness passed every declared case and produced signed local receipts.
local-smoke.json records semantic assertions for decisions, draft presence, stop fields, classification labels, and gated send status.
The happy path produced msg-001 as needs_reply/time_sensitive and msg-002 as digest/no_reply.
Draft output: msg-001 produces subject 'Re: Launch checklist review' and a concise reply that acknowledges receipt, promises only a later human-confirmed update, and avoids final approval.
Stop paths cover a missing sender, a missing body, an explicit auto-send request, and a disallowed draft commitment.
Missing sender and missing body return decision=needs_more_evidence and do not draft or mutate mailbox state.
Auto-send returns decision=refused and records operator_policy.auto_send as the stop condition.
Digest-only packets return decision=ready, classify the message as no_reply, and do not propose a draft.
Reply drafting is bounded by supplied sender/operator allowed topics, optional operator allowed intents, and allowed/forbidden commitment policy.
Publisher owner and live registry ref are pending public publish; intended registry ref is <owner>/inbox-triage@0.1.0.

Public PR, raw X.yaml URL, raw SKILL.md URL, hosted harness status, dogfood command, runx verify verdict, source_url, public_url, and registry metadata are pending public submission because they require GitHub/Frantic account action.
Fixtures use synthetic messages and no private mailbox data.
Outbound work is represented only as a send-as approval proposal.
